markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, performance, and a new FAQ experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Refined:** The strategy now focuses on high-intent topics (expense management, industry-specific) to capture prospects unaware of Hotel Engine's solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**FAQ Experiment Approved:** A low-risk MVP (10–20 pages) will test an FAQ hub built from Reddit research to capture LLM traffic and improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [**Content Workflow Optimized:** A new workflow will deliver content for approval by Thursday EOD, giving Joel a dedicated review window on Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [**Performance Signals Strong:** Sessions are trending up, a new "Policy Enforcement" pillar shows 70% engagement, and competitive share against Navon is growing.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Strategy Refinement:** The strategy was refreshed to focus on high-intent topics, as these were driving the most traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [**Pillar 1: Expense & Financial Management**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
          - [**Pain Points:** End-of-month chaos, reconciliation, policy enforcement (custom fields), and non-refundable rates.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
          - [**Solutions:** Direct bill, incidental coverage, and NGINX features.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [**Pillar 2: Industry-Specific Content**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
          - [**Focus:** Core industries like construction, targeting high-intent, lower-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Pillar 3: FAQ/Glossary Experiment**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
          - [**Goal:** Capture LLM traffic and answer user questions.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Performance Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Sessions are trending up, following a similar seasonal pattern to last year.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [**Pillar Performance:** The new "Policy Enforcement" pillar shows strong early engagement (70% rate, 53 sessions in one week).](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [**LLM Traffic:** Has tripled since the partnership began, with ChatGPT as the primary driver.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Competitive Share:** Increased 5 percentage points vs. Navon, signaling the strategy is working.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

### Content Workflow & Approvals

  - [**Problem:** Content approval delays were slowing the publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new workflow was established to create a dedicated review window for Joel.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**New Cadence:** GrowthX will deliver content for approval by **Thursday EOD**.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This gives Joel a buffer on Thursday and a clear review window on Friday, which is a lighter meeting day.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [**Content Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Conference Posts:** To preserve SEO ranking, future posts will be updated with new dates/venues instead of being rewritten.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**NGINX Content:** The "Employee Expense Cards" topic is paused due to an uncertain NGINX launch timeline. It will be replaced by a "Refunds and Travel Credits" article.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

### New FAQ/Glossary Experiment

  - [**Proposal:** A new FAQ hub designed to capture LLM traffic and improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [**Methodology:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [**Research:** Scrape Reddit for high-engagement questions to identify user pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [**Structure:** Each page will focus on a primary question, with related questions and answers below.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [**MVP Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [Launch with 10–20 pages to test for clear traction (e.g., citation growth).](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This low-risk approach avoids major structural changes to the site's existing FAQ page, which receives significant traffic (\~1,400 sessions/month).](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [**Team Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Barry and Luke confirmed this approach was effective at previous companies.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
      - [Joel will share an offline resource on using ChatGPT for deep research to surface questions.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
      - [Deliver content for approval by Thursday EOD, starting with next week's batch.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [Update the FAQ experiment brief to reflect the MVP structure (adding to the existing FAQ page).](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Share the resource on using ChatGPT for deep research.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
      - [Begin building the FAQ experiment MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up session for Luke if needed to review the strategy in depth.](https://fathom.video/share/NsCRs2yzeDu3NmAFv64sSjvs8yHjJ37E?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
